prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第88名，近年排名在86–102之间波动，整体稳定；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面（师德师风事件），可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度一般（总排名第90位），未见明显热度异常；历史投档异常记录中未出现该校；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），中药学等相关学科实力突出，与该校招生专业高度匹配，对药学方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/制药类属生化环材大类，2024年专业热度评估为"一般观望"，较2023年"明显劝退"有所改善；本省2026年物理类考生约14.36万人（按历史比例估算），与2025年14.34万人基本持平；该校位于江苏南京，非本省院校，无本地招生倾斜；2025年该校在辽宁省总招生51人（含物理类47人+历史类5人），占该校全国招生总量约8.5%，属中等偏上招生规模省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生规模稳定及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年略有加剧；预测最低位次约11186名，区间10686–11686名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9467 → 10465 → 10125 → 10369 → 11166, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 1000 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is about 11166; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 48 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 47 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 47, unchanged from 2025, with stable total enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 88th in 2026, with fluctuations between 86 and 102 in recent years, overall stable; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was slightly negative (teacher ethics incident), which may mildly suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity is average (90th overall), with no obvious abnormal heat; no historical abnormal admission records; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and related disciplines like Chinese Materia Medica are strong, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, strongly attracting pharmacy-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Pharmacy/Pharmaceutical majors belong to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials category; in 2024, the major popularity assessment was "generally wait-and-see," improving from the 2023 "clearly discouraged" status; the province's 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 143,600 (estimated by historical proportion), roughly unchanged from 2025's 143,400; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local institution, with no local enrollment bias; in 2025, the university enrolled a total of 51 students in Liaoning Province (47 in Physics Category + 5 in History Category), accounting for about 8.5% of its national enrollment, a medium-to-large enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the declining trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, stable provincial candidate numbers, and slightly negative reputation, competition in the 2026 Physics Category is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 11186, with a range of 10686 to 11686.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (10686–11686), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint target, and Tier 3 majors as a safety choice; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 10500), you can focus on sprinting for the top Tier 1 Pharmacy Experimental Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 11500), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors as a stable option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1642 → 1791 → 1959 → 2395 → 2546, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 800 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2546; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 students each year from 2021 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 8 students, an increase of 3 students (+60%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 88th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (teacher ethics incident), which may have a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 90th), with no obvious abnormal popularity; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline, but the History Category enrollment majors are the Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction), which have low correlation with the core discipline of Pharmacy.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of Economic Management majors was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', and English majors were 'generally wait-and-see'; the number of History Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 56,400 (estimated based on historical proportion), basically the same as 56,300 in 2025; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a provincial institution; in 2025, the university enrolled only 5 students in History Category in Liaoning Province, a small proportion, and even after expansion to 8 students, it remains a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (+60%), and the stable number of examinees in the province, it is expected that competition in the History Category in 2026 will be significantly eased compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3433, with a range of 2933–3933.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (2933–3933), there are only 2 enrollment majors in History Category. The Economic Management Experimental Class has a higher ranking requirement (reference 2025 about 2319), while the English major is relatively easier to enter (reference 2025 about 2546); if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2900), the Economic Management Experimental Class can be considered as a priority; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 3800), the English major should be the main choice.
